last_result: Static integration audit found three P0 gaps: no symmetric checkpoint Interface, no disabled typed diagnostic policy, and no scoped evidence-bearing memory contract. The minimum design is two new deep Modules: OrderRegimeDiagnosticCoordinator and OrderRegimeEvidenceProjector. Existing runner, manifest, recorder, controller, generic RAG, and FME v2 paths remain unchanged. No code, test, candidate evaluation, API/LLM call, held-out access, or cohort was executed.
